title: CHILDREN'S COMMUNITY CLINIC - 211info
text: CHILDREN'S COMMUNITY CLINIC CHILDREN'S COMMUNITY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary pediatric care. Services include well baby and child checkups, physical exams, acute care (flu, infection, wound care), chronic care (asthma, allergies, diabetes), pelvic and Pap exams, contraception, sexually transmitted disease screening and treatment, and immunizations. 2252 Lloyd Center Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Primary care: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 284-5239 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 284-5239 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment; call ahead for walk-in hours FEES: Accepts the following OHP plans: Health Share/Care Oregon, as well as some private insurance. Uninsured patients paying on the day of service are charged $200 for general services. Labs and other tests may cost more. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Ukrainian, Mandarin, Cantonese, Vietnamese, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon, 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: MAX line to Lloyd Center and all buses that stop at Lloyd Center Mall Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Contraception General Physical Examinations HIV Testing Nutrition Assessment Services Pap Tests Pediatric Developmental Screening Pediatrics Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information Well Baby Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
